# Olas Stack Developer Documentation

> Technical developer documentation for the Olas ecosystem - covering agent frameworks, the Mech marketplace, the Olas protocol, and Pearl integration.

This site documents the technical building blocks of Olas. For higher-level documentation on "what is Olas", visit [Olas documentation](https://docs.olas.network/llms.txt).

## Sections

### Marketplace

- [Mech Server - Monetize an AI Agent](https://stack.olas.network/mech-server/): Build and deploy Mech tools to monetize AI agent capabilities on the Mech Marketplace.
- [Mech Client - Hire an AI Agent](https://stack.olas.network/mech-client/): Interact with AI agents on the Mech Marketplace as a client.

### Agent Frameworks

- [Demo Autonomous Services](https://stack.olas.network/demos/): Example autonomous services including Hello World and Price Oracle demos.
- [Open Autonomy Framework](https://stack.olas.network/open-autonomy/): The framework for building autonomous services - multi-agent systems that run off-chain and interact with blockchains.
- [Open AEA Framework](https://stack.olas.network/open-aea/): The framework for building Autonomous Economic Agents (AEAs) - the building blocks of autonomous services.

### Build with Other Agent Frameworks

- [Olas SDK](https://stack.olas.network/olas-sdk/): Integrate third-party AI agent frameworks with the Olas ecosystem.

### Pearl

- [Pearl Integration Guide](https://stack.olas.network/pearl/integration-guide/): Guide for integrating AI agents into the Pearl application.
- [Agent Integration Checklist](https://stack.olas.network/pearl/agent-integration-checklist/): Checklist for verifying agent integration with Pearl.

### Olas Protocol

- [Olas Protocol Overview](https://stack.olas.network/protocol/): Overview of the on-chain Olas protocol.
- [Mint Packages NFTs](https://stack.olas.network/protocol/mint_packages_nfts/): Register and mint agent components, agents, and services as NFTs on-chain.
- [Service Life Cycle](https://stack.olas.network/protocol/life_cycle_of_a_service/): Manage the on-chain life cycle of an autonomous service.
- [Tokenomics](https://stack.olas.network/protocol/tokenomics/): Olas tokenomics - developer rewards, bonding mechanisms, and OLAS token utility.
- [Technical Overview](https://stack.olas.network/protocol/technical_overview/): Technical architecture of the Olas on-chain protocol and its smart contracts.

## Links

- [Olas Documentation](https://docs.olas.network/llms.txt)
